load-pdf-list-acroform-fields.title: Load PDF and List AcroForm Fields
load-pdf-list-acroform-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf, access its AcroForm, and iterate through all form fields to display each field's name and type.

read-acroform-fields-from-pdf-stream.title: Read AcroForm Fields from a PDF Stream
read-acroform-fields-from-pdf-stream.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF as a read‑only stream, creating an Aspose.Pdf Document from it, and enumerating AcroForm fields with type‑safe value extraction without writing to disk.

retrieve-acroform-fields-from-pdf.title: Retrieve All AcroForm Fields from a PDF
retrieve-acroform-fields-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its AcroForm collection, and iterate through all form fields to read properties such as name, value and read‑only status.

retrieve-modify-pdf-form-field.title: Retrieve and Modify PDF Form Field by Name
retrieve-modify-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate a form field using the Document.Form indexer, read its properties, change its value, and save the updated document.

iterate-pdf-pages-list-form-fields.title: Iterate PDF Pages to List Form Fields
iterate-pdf-pages-list-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, loop through each page, retrieve the form fields in tab order, and output each field's full name.

enumerate-pdf-form-fields-on-page.title: Enumerate PDF Form Fields on a Specific Page
enumerate-pdf-form-fields-on-page.description: Loads a PDF document, checks for form fields, and iterates over widget annotations on a given page, logging each field's name, type, and value.

read-checkbox-value-to-boolean.title: Read Checkbox Field Value and Convert to Boolean
read-checkbox-value-to-boolean.description: Loads a PDF, accesses its form, reads the Value of a CheckboxField and converts the string value to a Boolean indicating whether the box is checked.

parse-numeric-form-fields-to-decimal.title: Parse Numeric Form Fields to Decimal
parse-numeric-form-fields-to-decimal.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its form fields, extracts values from NumberField controls, parses the text into a decimal using invariant culture, and demonstrates a simple calculation.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, export all form fields to a JSON string using the ExportToJson method, and output the result.

save-json-data-to-utf8-file.title: Save JSON Data to UTF-8 File
save-json-data-to-utf8-file.description: Shows how to write a JSON string to a file on disk using UTF‑8 encoding with File.WriteAllText.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-xml.title: Export PDF Form Fields to XML
export-pdf-form-fields-to-xml.description: Loads a PDF document, iterates through its form fields, and writes each field's name and value to an XML file using a FileStream and XmlWriter.

export-pdf-form-data-to-fdf.title: Export PDF Form Data to FDF
export-pdf-form-data-to-fdf.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF to the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form facade and exporting its form fields to an FDF file via a FileStream.

export-acroform-fields-to-xfdf.title: Export AcroForm Fields to XFDF
export-acroform-fields-to-xfdf.description: Loads a PDF document, creates a FileStream, and uses Aspose.Pdf to export all AcroForm fields (annotations) to an XFDF file.

export-pdf-to-pdf-html-svg-with-stream-c.title: Export PDF to PDF, HTML, and SVG with Stream Cleanup
export-pdf-to-pdf-html-svg-with-stream-c.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and exporting it to PDF, HTML, and SVG formats while properly closing FileStream objects using using blocks.

modify-checkbox-appearance-extract-value.title: Modify Checkbox Appearance and Extract Value using Aspose.PDF Drawing
modify-checkbox-appearance-extract-value.description: The example loads a PDF, finds a checkbox form field, customizes its visual appearance with Aspose.Pdf.Drawing (Graph, Rectangle, GraphInfo), changes its style and state, extracts its value, and saves the modified document.

extract-pdf-form-fields.title: Extract PDF Form Field Names and Values
extract-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, iterate through all form fields, and return a dictionary mapping each field's full name to its current string value.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v2.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON Files
export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v2.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a folder, load each with Aspose.Pdf, and export its form fields to a JSON file.

combine-pdf-form-data-to-json.title: Combine Form Data from Multiple PDFs into a JSON Array
combine-pdf-form-data-to-json.description: The example loads several PDF files, exports each form's fields to JSON, and merges the individual JSON objects into a single JSON array for batch processing.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v3.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v3.description: Shows how to create a command‑line utility that loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and exports its interactive form fields to a JSON file.

extract-pdf-forms-with-timestamp-logging.title: Extract PDF Forms with Timestamp Logging
extract-pdf-forms-with-timestamp-logging.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterating through pages to extract XForm text, and logging start and end timestamps for the extraction run.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json-byte-array.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON Byte Array
export-pdf-form-data-to-json-byte-array.description: Loads a PDF, extracts all form fields as JSON using Aspose.Pdf, writes the JSON to a MemoryStream, and returns the content as a byte array for API consumption.

export-filtered-pdf-form-fields-to-json.title: Export Filtered PDF Form Fields to JSON
export-filtered-pdf-form-fields-to-json.description: The example loads a PDF document, iterates over its form fields, selects only those whose names start with a specified prefix, extracts their values, and writes the resulting name‑value pairs to a formatted JSON file.

count-acroform-fields-in-pdf.title: Count AcroForm Fields in a PDF
count-acroform-fields-in-pdf.description: Loads a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, accesses the Form collection, retrieves the total number of AcroForm fields via Document.Form.Count, and writes the count to the console.

iterate-pdf-form-fields-update-textboxes.title: Iterate Over PDF Form Fields and Update Text Boxes
iterate-pdf-form-fields-update-textboxes.description: Demonstrates how to loop through all form fields in a PDF using a foreach loop, read each field's name and value, and modify text box fields before saving the document.

retrieve-pdf-form-field-types.title: Retrieve PDF Form Field Types
retrieve-pdf-form-field-types.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its form fields and prints each field's full name together with its concrete runtime type using GetType().

export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v4.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON via FileStream
export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v4.description: Shows how to load a PDF, set JSON export options, and write all form fields directly to a JSON file using a FileStream.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-memorystream.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML via MemoryStream
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-memorystream.description: Shows how to export form fields from a PDF document to an XML representation using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form and write the XML from a MemoryStream to a file.

export-pdf-form-data-to-fdf__v2.title: Export PDF Form Data to FDF Using Aspose.Pdf
export-pdf-form-data-to-fdf__v2.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF document, accessing its form fields via the Form facade, and exporting the data to an FDF file using a FileStream.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Form Data to XFDF Using FileStream
export-pdf-form-data-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, using the Form facade to export its form fields to an XFDF file via a FileStream, and properly releasing resources.

log-form-field-count-per-pdf-page.title: Log Form Field Count per PDF Page
log-form-field-count-per-pdf-page.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page to count and log form fields, then flattens the document and saves the result.

extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF to SVG Files
extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and use SvgExtractor to export each vector graphic as an individual SVG file in separate page folders.

extract-vector-graphics-to-svg__v2.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF Page to SVG
extract-vector-graphics-to-svg__v2.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, select a specific page, and extract each vector graphic on that page as separate SVG files using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-vector-graphics-to-combined-svg.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF to Combined SVG
extract-vector-graphics-to-combined-svg.description: Loads a PDF, extracts vector graphics from each page as SVG using Aspose.Pdf's SvgExtractor, and merges them into a single multi‑page SVG document.

extract-pdf-subpaths-to-png.title: Extract PDF Subpaths and Export as PNG Images
extract-pdf-subpaths-to-png.description: Shows how to use GraphicsAbsorber to capture each SubPath on PDF pages, save them as SVG, and convert each SVG to an individual PNG file.

export-pdf-page-as-raster-image.title: Export PDF Page as Raster Image with Specified DPI
export-pdf-page-as-raster-image.description: Shows how to load a PDF, flatten transparency, and convert a page (including vector graphics) to a raster PNG image at a chosen resolution using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-single-graphic-element-as-svg.title: Extract Single Graphic Element as SVG from PDF
extract-single-graphic-element-as-svg.description: Shows how to load a PDF, use Aspose.Pdf.Vector.SvgExtractor to get vector graphics from a page, pick one element by its index, and save it as an SVG file.

extract-first-page-text-to-utf8-file.title: Extract First Page Text from PDF to UTF-8 File
extract-first-page-text-to-utf8-file.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract the text of the first page using a TextAbsorber, and save the result to a UTF‑8 encoded text file.

extract-text-from-pdf-to-txt.title: Extract Text from PDF and Save to TXT
extract-text-from-pdf-to-txt.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, use TextAbsorber to extract all page text, and write the concatenated result to a .txt file.

extract-stamp-texts-to-json.title: Extract Stamp Annotation Texts from PDF to JSON
extract-stamp-texts-to-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages and annotations, identify stamp annotations, collect their text content, and serialize the results into a JSON array.

extract-annotate-superscripts-subscripts.title: Extract and Annotate Superscripts/Subscripts from PDF
extract-annotate-superscripts-subscripts.description: The example loads a PDF, extracts text fragments with positioning information, heuristically identifies superscript and subscript segments based on baseline and font size, and writes the annotated text to an output file.

extract-paragraphs-with-line-breaks.title: Extract Paragraphs with Line Breaks from PDF
extract-paragraphs-with-line-breaks.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to extract paragraph structures from a PDF while preserving line breaks and save the result to a text file.

extract-images-from-pdf-to-png.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as PNG
extract-images-from-pdf-to-png.description: Loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterates through each page's image resources, and saves every extracted image as a PNG file in a specified output folder.

extract-export-pdf-fonts-ttf.title: Extract and Export Fonts from a PDF to TTF Files
extract-export-pdf-fonts-ttf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page's font resources, and save each unique font as a TrueType (.ttf) file to a specified directory.

extract-pdf-tables-to-csv.title: Extract PDF Tables to CSV Files
extract-pdf-tables-to-csv.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to detect tables in a PDF document and export each detected table as a separate CSV file.

export-acroform-fields-to-json.title: Export AcroForm Fields to JSON
export-acroform-fields-to-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its AcroForm fields, and export them directly to a JSON file.

batch-extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.title: Batch Extract Vector Graphics from PDFs to SVG
batch-extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, extract each page's vector graphics using Aspose.Pdf, and save them as individual SVG files in a common output directory.

parallel-pdf-text-extraction.title: Parallel PDF Text Extraction with TPL
parallel-pdf-text-extraction.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from multiple PDF files concurrently using the Task Parallel Library and Aspose.Pdf's TextAbsorber.

export-pdf-to-svg-with-dpi-options.title: Export PDF to SVG with Custom DPI and Extraction Options
export-pdf-to-svg-with-dpi-options.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to SVG using Aspose.Pdf with pixel‑based scaling (DPI) and multithreading, and extracting individual vector graphics from a page with custom extraction settings.

extract-large-vector-graphics-to-svg.title: Extract Large Vector Graphics from PDF as SVG
extract-large-vector-graphics-to-svg.description: Loads a PDF, absorbs vector graphics on each page, filters them by bounding rectangle area, and exports the qualifying graphics as individual SVG files.

extract-graphics-svg-from-selected-pdf-p.title: Extract Graphics as SVG from Selected PDF Pages
extract-graphics-svg-from-selected-pdf-p.description: Shows how to use GraphicsAbsorber to collect graphic elements from specific PDF pages and convert them into SVG files with SvgExtractor.

combine-pdf-vectors-into-multi-page-svg.title: Combine PDF Vector Graphics into a Multi‑Page SVG
combine-pdf-vectors-into-multi-page-svg.description: Loads multiple PDF files, extracts vector graphics from each page using Aspose.Pdf's SvgExtractor, and merges them into a single multi‑page SVG document.

extract-subpaths-to-separate-svg.title: Extract Each Subpath to Separate SVG Files
extract-subpaths-to-separate-svg.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, configure SVG extraction to create an individual SVG for every graphic subpath, and save each subpath as a separate image with a transparent background.

extract-vector-graphics-from-encrypted-p.title: Extract Vector Graphics from Encrypted PDF to SVG
extract-vector-graphics-from-encrypted-p.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF by supplying a password, then export its vector graphics as an SVG file using Aspose.Pdf.

preserve-pdf-coordinate-system-to-svg.title: Convert PDF Pages to SVG While Preserving Coordinate System
preserve-pdf-coordinate-system-to-svg.description: Loads a PDF, sets SvgSaveOptions.ScaleToPixels to false to keep the original PDF point coordinate system, and saves each page as a separate SVG file.

pdf-summary-report-image-graphic-text.title: PDF Summary Report: Count Images, Graphics, and Text Length
pdf-summary-report-image-graphic-text.description: The example loads each PDF in a folder, counts extracted images and XObject graphics on all pages, extracts all text, and prints a summary of image count, graphic count, and total text length.

check-missing-fonts-in-pdf.title: Check for Missing Fonts in a PDF Document
check-missing-fonts-in-pdf.description: The example loads a PDF, iterates through each page's font resources, and reports any fonts that are not installed on the system.

extract-pdf-metadata-and-save-vector-gra.title: Extract PDF Metadata and Save Vector Graphics as SVG
extract-pdf-metadata-and-save-vector-gra.description: Demonstrates how to read basic PDF metadata (author, title) and export the document or individual pages as SVG vector graphics, with optional text extraction for documentation.

extract-images-using-graphicsabsorber.title: Extract Images from PDF Using GraphicsAbsorber
extract-images-using-graphicsabsorber.description: Shows how to employ GraphicsAbsorber to collect only image elements on each PDF page, ignore other graphics, and save the extracted images as JPEG files.

extract-pdf-paragraphs-to-markdown.title: Extract PDF Paragraphs to Markdown Preserving Indentation
extract-pdf-paragraphs-to-markdown.description: Loads a PDF, uses Aspose.Pdf's ParagraphAbsorber to collect paragraphs from each page while keeping leading spaces, and writes the text to a UTF‑8 markdown file.

extract-superscript-subscript-from-pdf.title: Extract Superscript and Subscript Text from PDF
extract-superscript-subscript-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract text fragments with formatting, detect superscript or subscript flags, and write the extracted text wrapped in custom Unicode markers.

export-pdf-tables-to-csv-with-border-mar.title: Export PDF Tables to CSV with Border Markers
export-pdf-tables-to-csv-with-border-mar.description: Demonstrates how to extract tables from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, preserve visual cell borders, and write the data to a CSV file with delimiter markers for easy reference.

extract-checkbox-states-from-pdf-acrofor.title: Extract Checkbox States from PDF AcroForm
extract-checkbox-states-from-pdf-acrofor.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its AcroForm fields, collects the checked state of each checkbox, and writes the boolean list to a JSON file.

extract-selected-radio-button-labels.title: Extract Selected Radio Button Labels from PDF Form
extract-selected-radio-button-labels.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate its form fields, identify radio button fields, and obtain the display label and export value of the selected option.

extract-vector-graphics-brand-color.title: Extract Vector Graphics and Apply Brand Color to SVG
extract-vector-graphics-brand-color.description: Creates a PDF with vector graphics, extracts them as SVG, replaces the original colors with a brand palette, and saves the transformed SVG.
